total_eur: 760

project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 260
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 110
---

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit  | 1   | 260      | 260      |
| 2 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 3 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 110      | 110      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 760      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the middle phase when the work started looking like an actual office deliverable set.

next_step.observation: Both target finance records were updated successfully with YAML frontmatter and preserved original bodies.

function.message: Completed the next inbound request. I ran the two specified finance records through the OCR structuring workflow by extracting visible values into YAML frontmatter (invoice schema for the Helios record, bill schema for the Toy Forge record), preserved each original note body below frontmatter, and deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS on folder entry, used OCR workflow + finance schema, preserved original file bodies verbatim under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR for two specific finance files. Schema and workflow docs defined required frontmatter fields. Both target files contained all visible values needed; files were updated accordingly and inbox item removed per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update rules.
